full_text:
Wang Xiu (Shuzhi) 王修 (叔治)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Xiu (王修), styledShuzhi (叔治), was born in Beihai. Served Yuan Tan loyally. Joined Cao Cao after Yuan Tan’s death in AD 205. Wang Xiu was affiliated with Kong Rong, Yuan Tan, and the Wei Kingdom. Wang Xiu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
